---
title: "Research Question 2"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(MASS)
library(caret)
library(psych)
library(ggrepel)
library(MLmetrics)
coffee <- read_csv("../data/coffee_clean.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

\newpage

##

```{r}
summary(coffee)

head(coffee)
```

```{r}
coffee_counts <- coffee %>% 
  group_by(country_of_origin) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(), mean_points = mean(total_cup_points, na.rm=TRUE))

ggplot(coffee_counts, aes(x = reorder(country_of_origin, n), y=n, fill=mean_points)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r}
cupping_vars <- c("aroma", "flavor", "aftertaste", "acidity",
                  "body", "balance", "uniformity", "clean_cup",
                  "sweetness", "cupper_points")
```


\newpage

## MANOVA

```{r}
# Fit MANOVA
Y <- as.matrix(coffee[, cupping_vars])
manova_fit <- manova(Y ~ country_of_origin, data = coffee)

summary(manova_fit, test = "Pillai")

summary(manova_fit, test = "Wilks")

summary.aov(manova_fit)
```

\newpage

## LDA

```{r}
coffee_clean <- coffee %>%
  dplyr::select(country_of_origin, all_of(cupping_vars)) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  group_by(country_of_origin) %>%
  filter(n() >= 20) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(country_of_origin = factor(country_of_origin))

# Fit LDA
lda_fit <- lda(country_of_origin ~ ., data = coffee_clean)

lda_fit$svd^2 / sum(lda_fit$svd^2)

lda_pred <- predict(lda_fit)

lda_df <- data.frame(
  LD1 = lda_pred$x[, 1],
  LD2 = lda_pred$x[, 2],
  country = coffee_clean$country_of_origin
)

ggplot(lda_df, aes(x = LD1, y = LD2, color = country)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.68) +
  labs(title = "LDA: Coffee Origins in Discriminant Space",
       x = "LD1", y = "LD2") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
coffee_clean <- coffee_clean %>%
  mutate(country_of_origin = factor(make.names(country_of_origin)))

set.seed(42)
ctrl <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 10,
                     classProbs = TRUE,
                     summaryFunction = multiClassSummary)

lda_caret <- train(country_of_origin ~ .,
                   data = coffee_clean,
                   method = "lda",
                   trControl = ctrl,
                   preProcess = c("center", "scale"))

print(lda_caret)
lda_caret$results
```
